---
title: "Solutions Open Source"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Harnesses Open Source

## Cline

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/cline/cline` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, Anthropic) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | PostHog (désactivé en self-hosted) |
| ZDR | ✅ (self-hosted mode) |

**Points forts** : VS Code extension, self-hosted mode via `~/.cline/endpoints.json` auto-désactive PostHog + build-time OTEL (PR #8790), MCP support, plan/act modes.

**Points faibles** : Pas d'autocomplétion inline, dépend de l'API LLM choisie.

```bash
# Self-hosted mode = télémétrie OFF
# Créer ~/.cline/endpoints.json avec config locale → PostHog auto-désactivé
```

## Aider

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/Aider-AI/aider` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Opt-in (10% sampling) |
| ZDR | ✅ (connexion directe machine→AI provider) |

**Points forts** : CLI pur, git-native (commits auto), connexion directe machine→AI provider (pas de serveur intermédiaire), support multi-model, repo map.

**Points faibles** : CLI uniquement (pas d'IDE), pas d'autocomplétion.

```bash
# Désactiver analytics
aider --analytics-disable

# Avec Ollama local (zéro télémétrie)
aider --model ollama/qwen3:32b
```

## Continue.dev

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/continuedev/continue` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, local) |
| Niveau autonomie | L2-L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (local mode) |

**Points forts** : VS Code + JetBrains, autocomplétion + chat, config flexible, support local models, RAG sur codebase.

**Points faibles** : Moins puissant que Cline pour l'agentic, setup plus complexe.

## Goose (Block)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/block/goose` |
| Modèle | Any (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Off par défaut |
| ZDR | ✅ |

**Points forts** : Télémétrie off par défaut, CLI + VS Code, MCP support natif, Ollama integration simple.

```bash
# Télémétrie déjà off par défaut, mais pour être explicite:
export GOOSE_TELEMETRY_ENABLED=false
```

## Roo Code

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/RooCodeInc/Roo-Code` |
| Modèle | Any |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (local mode) |

**Points forts** : Fork de Cline avec améliorations, modes (architect, coder, tester), MCP support.

## OpenHands

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands` |
| Modèle | Any |
| Niveau autonomie | L4 |
| Licence | MIT |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (self-hosted) |

**Points forts** : Agent fully-autonome, sandbox Docker, browser + terminal + editor, résolution d'issues end-to-end.

**Points faibles** : Plus lourd, nécessite Docker, coût LLM élevé (multi-turn long).

## Tabby

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/TabbyML/tabby` |
| Modèle | Self-hosted (StarCoder, CodeLlama, custom) |
| Niveau autonomie | L1 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Aucune en self-hosted |
| ZDR | ✅ (100% on-prem) |

**Points forts** : 100% on-prem, aucune télémétrie, fine-tuning sur codebase entreprise, autocomplétion inline.

**Points faibles** : L1 seulement, pas d'agent, nécessite GPU pour de bonnes performances.

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_OSS_START -->
### [ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)
🌊 The leading agent meta-harness. Deploy intelligent multi-player swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning intelligence,...

⭐ 65.7k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agentic-framework`, `agentic-workflow`, `agents`, `ai-agents`, `ai-assistant`, `ai-coding`, `ai-skills`

### [gpt-engineer](https://github.com/AntonOsika/gpt-engineer)
CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

⭐ 55.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `autonomous-agent`, `code-generation`, `codebase-generation`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `gpt-4`, `gpt-engineer`

### [awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code)
A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectab...

⭐ 50.8k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-code`, `agentic-coding`, `ai-workflow-optimization`, `ai-workflows`, `anthropic`, `anthropic-claude`, `awesome`

### [tabby](https://github.com/TabbyML/tabby)
Self-hosted AI coding assistant

⭐ 33.8k | `Rust` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `coding-language`, `developer-experience`, `developer-tools`, `gen-ai`, `ide`

### [gpt-pilot](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot)
The first real AI developer

⭐ 33.7k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `gpt-4`, `research-project`

### [oraios/serena](https://github.com/oraios/serena)
🐍 🏠 - A fully-featured coding agent that relies on symbolic code operations by using language servers.

⭐ 26.8k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `ide`, `jetbrains`

### [Archon](https://github.com/coleam00/Archon)
The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

⭐ 23.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `automation`, `bun`, `claude`, `cli`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `typescript`

### [oh-my-pi](https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi)
⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

⭐ 19.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai-agent`, `ai-coding-agent`, `anthropic`, `bun`, `claude`, `cli`, `coding-assistant`, `llm`

### [pr-agent](https://github.com/The-PR-Agent/pr-agent)
🚀 PR Agent: The Original Open-Source PR Reviewer. This project is not the Qodo free tier.

⭐ 12.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `code-review`, `codereview`, `coding-assistant`, `devtools`, `gpt-4`, `openai`, `pull-request`, `pull-requests`

### [bananas](https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas)
Bananas🍌, Cross-Platform screen 🖥️ sharing 📡 made simple ⚡.

⭐ 6.3k | `Svelte` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-22
**Tags** : `cross-platform`, `multi-cursor`, `p2p`, `pair-programming`, `pairing`, `peer-to-peer`, `screensharing`

### [vibe-vibe](https://github.com/datawhalechina/vibe-vibe)
AI for All: The First Systematic Vibe Coding Tutorial | From Zero to Full-Stack, Bring Your Ideas to Life | Live at: www.vibevibe.cn ；全民AI学习第一课，首个系统化 Vibe Coding 开源教程 | 零基础到全栈实战，让人人都能借助 AI 实现自己的想法与...

⭐ 5.8k | `Dockerfile` | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `agentic-ai`, `ai`, `coding-assistant`, `programming`, `vibe-coding`, `vibecoding`

### [claude-code-ultimate-guide](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide)
The most comprehensive Claude Code guide: agentic workflows, hooks, skills, MCP servers, quizzes, and production-ready templates. 430K+ lines.

⭐ 5.5k | `Python` | Licence: CC-BY-SA-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agentic-coding`, `ai-assistant`, `ai-coding`, `ai-pair-programming`, `ai-security`, `anthropic`, `best-practices`, `claude`

### [byterover-cli](https://github.com/campfirein/byterover-cli)
ByteRover CLI (brv) - The portable memory layer for autonomous coding agents (formerly Cipher)

⭐ 4.9k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `autonomous-agents`, `cli`, `coding-assistant`, `context-memory`, `developer-tools`, `knowledge-management`

### [awesome-devteam](https://github.com/leehosung/awesome-devteam)
좋은 개발팀을 만드는데 도움이 되는 자료

⭐ 3.4k | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-08
**Tags** : `cto`, `devteam`, `pair-programming`

### [teleconsole](https://github.com/gravitational/teleconsole)
Command line tool to share your UNIX terminal and forward local TCP ports to people you trust.

⭐ 2.8k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `cli`, `collaboration`, `pair-programming`, `ssh`, `terminal-based`, `tools`, `tunnel`

### [live-share](https://github.com/microsoft/live-share)
Real-time collaborative development from the comfort of your favorite tools

⭐ 2.4k | Licence: CC-BY-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-22
**Tags** : `collaboration`, `pair-programming`, `visual-studio`, `visual-studio-code`

### [AgentsMesh](https://github.com/AgentsMesh/AgentsMesh)
The AI Agent Workforce Platform. Remote AI workstations (AgentPods) with PTY sandbox + git worktree isolation, multi-agent collaboration via channels and pod bindings, built-in Kanban with MR/PR in...

⭐ 2.3k | `Go` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent-orchestration`, `agentsmesh`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agent-workforce-platform`, `ai-coding`, `aider`, `claude-code`, `codex-cli`

### [Nanocoder](https://github.com/Nano-Collective/nanocoder)
Local-first CLI coding agent built with React and Ink. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 2.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `coding-agents`, `llm`, `llm-inference`, `ollama`, `openai`

### [mcp-shrimp-task-manager](https://github.com/cjo4m06/mcp-shrimp-task-manager)
Shrimp Task Manager is a task tool built for AI Agents, emphasizing chain-of-thought, reflection, and style consistency. It converts natural language into structured dev tasks with dependency track...

⭐ 2.1k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-23
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `codeagent`, `coding-assistant`, `cursor-ai`, `cursorai`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`

### [mob](https://github.com/remotemobprogramming/mob)
Tool for smooth git handover.

⭐ 1.8k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `cli`, `cli-tool`, `ensemble`, `ensemble-programming`, `ensembles`, `extreme-programming`, `git`, `go`

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_OSS_END -->
